message:
feat(algorithms): add average_shortest_path_length_undirected function signature

Extract undirected variant of average_shortest_path_length into its own
dedicated function, separating it from the directed implementation. This
gives the undirected path-length computation a proper function boundary
(`fn average_shortest_path_length_undirected`) that takes `&Graph`
instead of `&DiGraph`, mirroring the existing directed API.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
